author: Trinity/Codex automation run for user
name: Canonical reproduction of SP8192 LQER + SparseGate + BOS-fixed SmearGate stack
blurb: Single-seed canonical reproduction/support run for the public 2026-04-27 SP8192 LQER SparseGate BOS-fixed SmearGate 9-hparam stack. No new architecture claim; this run uses the source record's train_gpt.py, tokenizer, CaseOps data path, compression, and default hparams with canonical romeerp/parameter-golf-caseops-v1 shards. Seed 42 reproduced val_bpb 1.05985469, total submission size 15,898,155 bytes.
dataset_layout: 39 canonical train shards, one validation token shard, one validation byte-sidecar shard
technique_summary: Reproduction of the source record stack: 11L XSA + LQER int4-rank4 + SparseAttnGate + BOS-fixed SmearGate + Polar-Express Muon + per-group lrzip compression + phased TTT. No new ML technique is claimed in this folder.
